title: coppensia flexuosa
intro: Coppensia flexuosa, also known as the 'false flax', is a plant species belonging to the family Linaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Coppensia flexuosa include wound healing, fever reduction, and the treatment of various skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to make topical creams and ointments for skin and wound care.
